description_long: This is a military-style helmet with a camouflage pattern in shades of green, brown, and tan, showing signs of wear and some blood stains. The front features a row of rifle bullets tucked into a band and a prominent white peace symbol patch. On one side, a playing card (the Jack of Spades) is tucked into the helmet band, adding a personal touch. The helmet's surface is matte and slightly rough, with visible scuffs and scratches. There are no visible ventilation holes or a visor, and the retention system is not apparent. The overall design suggests a rugged, utilitarian item with symbolic and personal embellishments.
description: A worn camouflage military helmet with a peace symbol, bullets, and a playing card tucked into the band, showing signs of use and blood stains.
description_view_0: Front view showing the peace symbol patch and a row of bullets attached to the helmet band.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the full camouflage pattern with no visible embellishments or accessories.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the playing card (Jack of Spades) tucked into the band and some blood stains.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the peace symbol, bullets, and a partial view of the playing card.
attribute_graphic_design: Camouflage pattern with a white peace symbol patch, bullets, and a playing card (Jack of Spades) as notable visual elements.
